action_boundary: Should the goodwill refund exception be released?
communication_boundary: Small variances are controlled by the tolerance memo. Do not treat the existence of a mismatch as a blocker when the tolerance record covers it.

documents.text: Refund exception RF-GW-205 asks to release USD 76.43 to customer C-205.
Ledger calculation CALC-GW-205 computes the refund amount as USD 75.00 before rounding and fee adjustment.
Tolerance memo TOL-GW-205 permits refund calculation variance up to USD 1.00 for fee-adjusted goodwill refunds.
Supervisor approval APP-GW-205 binds RF-GW-205, customer C-205, and tolerance memo TOL-GW-205.
Goodwill refund release requires supervisor approval and any calculation variance to be inside the written tolerance memo.
